# Chapter 9: Synthetic biology and metabolic engineering  (~110 pp)
- 9.1 What synthetic biology is (10) · 9.2 Standard parts: BioBricks, the iGEM tradition (12) · 9.3 Genetic circuits: switches, oscillators, logic (18) · 9.4 Metabolic engineering: redirecting cellular flux (18) · 9.5 CRISPR and gene editing engineering-first (15) · 9.6 Directed evolution as design tool (12) · 9.7 Containment and biosafety levels (12) · 9.8 Failure section: gene-edit off-target effects, gain-of-function risks, dual-use bio (13)

**Archetype**: control, ethics. **Project**: design a simple genetic toggle switch on paper; defend its robustness. **Exercises**: 25.
